codeReview.summary: CopilotBackend fully implements the Backend interface with ChatCompletion, ChatCompletionStream, ListModels, and SupportsModel. Token discovery and exchange are properly wired. All required Copilot headers are set. 401 retry with loop prevention works correctly. Individual/Business/Enterprise URL support is implemented. 24 tests cover the happy paths, error handling, concurrent requests, and edge cases. Build, vet, and all tests pass.

issues.description: Streaming HTTP client created with no timeout at all (&http.Client{}). While the comment explains streams are long-lived, there is no connection establishment timeout. If the upstream hangs during connection, the goroutine will block indefinitely. Consider adding at least a DialContext with timeout, or use the shared client with a longer timeout.

Missing compile-time interface assertion. Best practice is to include 'var _ Backend = (*CopilotBackend)(nil)' to catch interface breakage at compile time. The handoff claims TestCopilotBackend_ImplementsInterface exists but it was not included in the committed code.

Test file ends with a comment '// Helper for creating bool pointer.' but no function body. The boolPtr function is defined in registry_test.go in the same package so it works, but the dangling comment is misleading.

No test for ChatCompletionStream 401 retry with re-auth. The non-streaming path is well-tested (TestCopilotBackend_Upstream401_RetryWithReauth and TestCopilotBackend_Upstream401_LoopPrevention), but the streaming retry path in doChatCompletionStream is not explicitly tested.
github.com/google/uuid is listed as '// indirect' but is now directly imported by copilot.go. Run 'go mod tidy' to move it to the direct require block.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker deviated from skill step 3 'Write Tests First (Red)' by writing tests and implementation together. The worker explained this was because the tests required mock servers tightly coupled to the implementation. The skill's TDD requirement may need a note allowing deviation for new files with mock infrastructure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false with deviation at step '3. Write Tests First (Red)'

sharedStateObservations.observation: The uuid package (github.com/google/uuid) was already available as an indirect dependency from the sqlite library. Workers can use it for generating request IDs without adding new dependencies.

summary: CopilotBackend implementation is solid and comprehensive. All 5 Backend interface methods are implemented correctly. Required Copilot headers (Authorization, Editor-Version, Editor-Plugin-Version, Copilot-Integration-Id, User-Agent, X-Request-Id) are set on every request. Token discovery, exchange, and caching work as expected. 401 retry with loop prevention (maxAuthRetries=1) is correctly implemented for both streaming and non-streaming paths. Individual/Business/Enterprise URL variants are supported via config. 24 tests provide good coverage of happy paths, error states, concurrent access, and edge cases. Build, vet, and all tests pass. Minor issues: missing compile-time interface check, streaming client has no timeout, streaming 401 retry untested, uuid dep is indirect, and test file has a dangling comment. None of these are blocking.
